blueprints/factory-run-signals/artifact-.reason: Constrained the product diff to workflow and required attestation artifacts.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/factory-l.reason: Defined the required Factory learning-signal reporting.

skills/bic/spec-governance-gate/SKILL.md.reason: Defined the authoring-first governance checkpoint enforced by the reusable workflow.

blueprints/factory-attestation.md.reason: Defined the product caller workflow and required merge check contexts.

.github/workflows/factory-attestation.ym.reason: Supplied the exact reusable workflow pinned by this product repository.

docs/architecture/bicameral-product/jour.reason: Pinned the latest canonical Journey Environment catalog validated by product PR CI.

local_setup_divergence.notes: The rollout used the exact merged Factory revision and introduced no local-only setup.

roadmap_reconciliation.notes: Factory #227 is the open organization-governance activation tracker. Its completion criteria remain unchecked; project item metadata was unavailable to the current token, so Todo is recorded conservatively.

invariants: No canonical state, authority, or persistence semantics changed.

minimization_review.rationale: This PR only delegates existing PR governance validation to an exact-revision reusable workflow; it does not introduce product lifecycle state.

state_refinement.notes: The workflow adds merge evidence and owner-decision enforcement without changing product behavior.

end_of_session_capture.notes: No new reusable Factory artifact was required. Cross-repository access will be verified by the rollout PR before branch protections are armed.
